title: ElectionStartedPayload
description: An election was opened (the operator lever — the one seeded step; everything after must be organic, 08-m2-plan ruling 2). Carries all three window boundaries so consumers can render 'nominations close at X' without querying government-service. Producer: government-service on government.events, aggregate = the Election. Root event (causationId null): the operator's REST call has no envelope parent.

nominatingEndsAt.description: Voting opens (inclusive). Additive refinement over the 03-events sketch: the civic prompt needs this boundary.

endsAt.description: Voting closes; the clock decides (or annuls) at this boundary.
